allow: Bash(npm search *Fix the dependency error now.The package @conflux-js/conflux does not exist.For Conflux eSpace projects, we should use standard Hardhat + ethers.js instead of js-conflux-sdk \(which is mainly for Core Space\).Please immediately update both package.json files:Root package.json：删除或替换 @conflux-js/conflux 为正确的依赖（如果需要的话只保留 hardhat、@nomicfoundation/hardhat-toolbox、dotenv、@openzeppelin/contracts 等）。agents/package.json：同样清理不必要的 conflux 依赖。然后重新运行：Bashcd conflux-milestone-escrownpm installcd agents && npm install && cd ..输出完整的修复结果和 npm install 的成功信息。)
